recommendations.title: Battle at Big Rock
recommendations.overview: A family's camping trip at Big Rock National Park becomes a terrifying fight for survival.

recommendations.title: Jurassic World
recommendations.overview: Twenty-two years after the events of Jurassic Park, Isla Nublar now features a fully functioning dinosaur theme park, Jurassic World, as originally envisioned by John Hammond.

recommendations.title: Safety Not Guaranteed
recommendations.overview: Three magazine employees head out on an assignment to interview a guy who placed a classified ad seeking a companion for time travel.

recommendations.title: Transformers: Rise of the Beasts

recommendations.title: A Quiet Place
recommendations.overview: A family is forced to live in silence while hiding from creatures that hunt by sound.

recommendations.title: Jurassic Galaxy
recommendations.overview: In the near future, a ship of space explorers crash land on an unknown planet. They're soon met with some of their worst fears as they discover the planet is inhabited by monstrous dinosaurs.

recommendations.title: Stargate
recommendations.overview: An interstellar teleportation device, found in Egypt, leads to a planet with humans resembling ancient Egyptians who worship the god Ra.
